'''âw-m-m-s''' ('''kawamesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wager|wager]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-m-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wager|wager]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-m-m-s
|-
! Lemma
| kawamesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwamesoko|thiwamesoko]] || [[word:jiwamesoko|jiwamesoko]] || [[word:shiwamesoko|shiwamesoko]] || [[word:kiwamesoko|kiwamesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
